1_ULqlB6p.max-1300x1300.png: Stacked Architecture for a Unified Commerce Platform Layer 1: Customer-Facing Edge Customer Traffic Cloud CDN (Caches content for speed) Layer 2: Core Application & API Platform GKE (Scales e-commerce microservices) Apigee (Manages APIs) Layer 3: Data & Analytics Foundation BigQuery (Supply chain analytics) Cloud Spanner (Real-time inventory data) Customer Traffic hits e-commerce site to Cloud CDN Cloud CDN forwards request to GKE GKE to Apigee for real-time inventory check GKE streams all sales data to BigQuery Apigee to Cloud Spanner
2_ySDDftu.max-1800x1800.png: Stacked Architecture for Inventory Recommendations Layer 1: Data Foundation BigQuery (Stores daily sales & inventory data) Layer 2: AI Forecasting Engine Vertex AI (Predicts item demand) Looker (Generates dashboards with recommended stock levels) Layer 3: Action & Delivery Google Sheets (Pushes recommendations to store associate devices) Data flows: BigQuery feeds historical data to Vertex AI, Vertex AI pushes recommendations to Looker, Looker pushes recommendations to Google Sheets.
3_vMPCBti.max-1800x1800.png: Stacked Architecture for Personalized E-commerce Search Layer 1: Data Ingestion & AI Enrichment (Backend) with components 1 Seller Lists Item, 2 Data Stored in Cloud Storage, 3 Real-time Data Processing (e.g., Dataflow), 4 Search Indexes & ML Models on GKE Layer 2: Real-time User Search with components 5 User Searches, 6 Personalized Rankings Served in Milliseconds Data flows: 1 Seller Lists Item to 2 Data Stored in Cloud Storage, 2 Data Stored in Cloud Storage to 3 Real-time Data Processing (e.g., Dataflow), 3 Real-time Data Processing (e.g., Dataflow) to 4 Search Indexes & ML Models on GKE, 5 User Searches Queries 4 Search Indexes & ML Models on GKE, 4 Search Indexes & ML Models on GKE Returns 6 Personalized Rankings Served in Milliseconds.
4_e00YJSf.max-2200x2200.png: Stacked Architecture for Digitizing Store Operations Layer 1: Store Associate Action with Associate Scans Shelf (on Android / ChromeOS device) Layer 2: Cloud AI & Business Logic with Vision AI (Identifies products), GKE Application (Cross-references data), and Inventory Data Layer 3: Actionable Insights with Device Displays Insights (Inventory status, ordering needs, or planogram compliance) Data flows: Associate Scans Shelf sends image for analysis to Vision AI, Vision AI sends to GKE Application, GKE Application accesses Inventory Data, GKE Application sends actionable info to Device Displays Insights.
5_RWn760J.max-2200x2200.png: Clear Stacked Architecture for an Interactive Media Support Agent Layer 1: User Request with Customer Asks Troubleshooting Question Layer 2: Backend AI Engine with Vertex AI (Understands intent), GKE Service (Orchestrates response), Cloud Storage (Stores visual aids) Layer 3: Final Interactive Response with App Displays Interactive Response (Text & Video) Data flows: Customer Asks Troubleshooting Question sends request to GKE Service, GKE Service gets intent from Vertex AI, GKE Service sends final response to App Displays Interactive Response, GKE Service connects to Cloud Storage.
6_MDrQVyN.max-1800x1800.png: Stacked Architecture for Product Description Generation Layer 1: Merchandiser Input with component Merchandiser Inputs Product Attributes Layer 2: AI Generation Engine with components Cloud Run Service (Constructs prompt) and Vertex AI (Gemini) (Generates descriptions) Layer 3: Human Review & Approval with component Merchandiser Reviews & Approves Descriptions Data flows: Merchandiser Inputs Product Attributes sends attributes to Cloud Run Service, Cloud Run Service sends to Vertex AI (Gemini), Vertex AI (Gemini) returns multiple options for review to Merchandiser Reviews & Approves Descriptions.
7_I2NQnI2.max-2000x2000.png: Stacked Architecture for AI-Powered Visual Search Layer 1: User Input with Customer Uploads Reference Photo Layer 2: AI Processing Engine with Cloud Run Service (uses Vision AI to create embedding) and Vertex AI Vector Search (Finds similar items) Layer 3: Final Output with Matching Products Are Displayed Indexed Product Catalog (Embeddings from GCS) Customer Uploads Reference Photo sends photo to Cloud Run Service Cloud Run Service connects to Vertex AI Vector Search Vertex AI Vector Search searches Indexed Product Catalog Vertex AI Vector Search returns matches to Matching Products Are Displayed
8_HNWeikf.max-1800x1800.png: Stacked Architecture for Product Recommendations Layer 1: Real-time Profile Enrichment (Backend) A. User Clickstream Data B. Dataflow (Processes events) C. User Profiles & Embeddings (Stored in BigQuery) Layer 2: Real-time Recommendation Serving (Frontend) 1 User Browses 2 Cloud Run Service 3 Vertex AI Matching Engine 4 Personalized Products Data flows: A -> B -> C, C -> 3, 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4, with a label "Provides user & item embeddings for matching" on the arrow from C to 3.
10_ZJk5gHN.max-2200x2200.png: Stacked Architecture for AI-Powered Proposal Comparison Layer 1: Inbox & Source Documents contains Gmail Thread and Vendor Proposals (PDFs, Docs, etc.) Layer 2: User & AI Interaction contains Buyer Prompts Gemini 'Compare these proposals' and Gemini Reads & Analyzes (Email context & attachments) Layer 3: Actionable Output contains Generated Summary & Comparison Table and Buyer Makes Faster, Informed Decision Data flows: Gmail Thread is in the Gmail thread to Vendor Proposals (PDFs, Docs, etc.) Buyer Prompts Gemini 'Compare these proposals' points to Gemini Reads & Analyzes (Email context & attachments) which points to Generated Summary & Comparison Table which points to Buyer Makes Faster, Informed Decision.
11_kKGBqRk.max-1900x1900.png: AI Pipeline for Duplicate Product Detection Layer 1: Data Ingestion & Transformation with Dataflow (Processes product catalog data) Layer 2: AI Feature Extraction & Clustering with Vertex AI (Creates vector embeddings) and BigQuery ML (Clusters similar embeddings) Layer 3: Actionable Insights with Review Dashboard / Merging Service Dataflow passes processed data to Vertex AI Vertex AI sends data to BigQuery ML BigQuery ML sends duplicate sets to Review Dashboard / Merging Service

76.max-1700x1700.png: Stacked Architecture for a Natural Language Data Agent Layer 1: User Interface with Employee Asks Question in BI Tool (Looker) Layer 2: AI & Data Engine with Gemini (Translates question to SQL) and BigQuery (Runs SQL query) Layer 3: Visualized Result with Results are Visualized for the Employee Data flow: Employee Asks Question in BI Tool (Looker) sends natural language query to Gemini, which translates the question to SQL and sends it to BigQuery, which runs the SQL query and returns data for visualization to Results are Visualized for the Employee.
77.max-2100x2100.png: Stacked Architecture for Agricultural Insights Layer 1: Data Ingestion On-Farm IoT Sensors Google Earth Engine (Satellite Imagery) Weather Data Layer 2: Data Platform & AI Engine BigQuery (Consolidates all data) Vertex AI (Generates hyper-local insights) Layer 3: Farmer-Facing Application Actionable Recommendation on Farmer's Device On-Farm IoT Sensors Consolidates BigQuery BigQuery Sends Vertex AI Vertex AI Sends Actionable Recommendation on Farmer's Device
83.max-2200x2200.png: Stacked Architecture for an AI Legal Aid Assistant Layer 1: User Input & Storage with User Uploads Photo of Legal Document and Google Cloud Storage Layer 2: AI Processing Engine with Cloud Run Service (Orchestrator), Document AI (Extracts text), and Gemini (Simplifies & explains) Layer 3: Final Output with App Displays Clear, Actionable Guidance User Uploads Photo of Legal Document flows to Google Cloud Storage Google Cloud Storage triggers Cloud Run Service (Orchestrator) Cloud Run Service (Orchestrator) sends image for extraction to Document AI Document AI returns structured text to Cloud Run Service (Orchestrator) Cloud Run Service (Orchestrator) sends to Gemini Gemini sends simplified guidance to App Displays Clear, Actionable Guidance
84.max-1900x1900.png: Clear Stacked Architecture for an SMS Public Benefits Bot Layer 1: User & Communication Gateway Person SMS API (e.g., Twilio) Layer 2: AI & Data Engine Vertex AI Conversation (Asks eligibility questions) Cloud Function (Contains business logic) Eligibility Database Person sends message to SMS API (e.g., Twilio) SMS API (e.g., Twilio) forwards message and gets response from Vertex AI Conversation Vertex AI Conversation communicates with Cloud Function Cloud Function communicates with Eligibility Database.
87.max-2000x2000.png: Stacked Architecture for AI-Powered Job Matching Layer 1: Data & Indexing Foundation (Backend) BigQuery (Stores user profiles) Create Vector Embeddings Vertex AI Vector Search (Indexes embeddings) Layer 2: Real-time Matching & Outreach Engine 1 New Job is Posted 2 Finds top candidates from Vertex AI Vector Search 3 Gemini Generates Personalized Pitch 4 Personalized Pitch is Ready Sends matches to BigQuery to Create Vector Embeddings to Vertex AI Vector Search to 2 Finds top candidates from to 3 Gemini Generates Personalized Pitch to 4 Personalized Pitch is Ready.
88.max-2200x2200.png: Stacked Architecture for an AI Citizen Chatbot Layer 1: Resident Interaction with component 1 Resident Asks Question on County Website Layer 2: AI Search & Retrieval Engine with components Cloud Run Service, Vertex AI Search, and Indexed Public Documents (Meeting minutes, etc.) Layer 3: Final Answer with component 3 Direct, Sourced Answer is Provided Data flows: 1 Resident Asks Question on County Website Sends query to Cloud Run Service, Cloud Run Service to Vertex AI Search, Vertex AI Search to Indexed Public Documents (Meeting minutes, etc.) with a dashed arrow, Vertex AI Search Returns answer to 3 Direct, Sourced Answer is Provided.
91.max-2000x2000.png: Simplified 2-Layer Stack for AI-Powered Asteroid Discovery Layer 1: AI Model Development Astronomical Data (GCS & BigQuery) Vertex AI Model Training (Computer Vision Model) Layer 2: AI Application & Verification Vertex AI Batch Prediction (Analyzes entire dataset) Astronomer Verification (Flags discoveries for review) Data flows: Astronomical Data flows to Vertex AI Model Training, Vertex AI Model Training deploys trained model to Vertex AI Batch Prediction, Vertex AI Batch Prediction flows to Astronomer Verification.
92_XALRRMJ.max-2000x2000.png: Stacked Architecture for a Personal AI Assistant Layer 1: Personal Model Training & Deployment (One-time) User Uploads Personal Data (to Cloud Storage) Fine-tune Gemini Model (Vertex AI) Deploy Personal Model (to Cloud Run Endpoint) Layer 2: Real-time Personal AI Interaction User Asks a Question Personal AI Responds (Reflects user's unique knowledge, style, and memory) User interacts with their deployed personal model User Uploads Personal Data (to Cloud Storage) flows to Fine-tune Gemini Model (Vertex AI) which flows to Deploy Personal Model (to Cloud Run Endpoint) which then flows to User Asks a Question which flows to Personal AI Responds (Reflects user's unique knowledge, style, and memory).
94.max-2000x2000.png: Stacked Architecture for an AI Sales Co-pilot Layer 1: Knowledge Foundation (Backend) BigQuery (Consolidates CRM, deal, & product data) Vertex AI Search (Indexes all sales data) Layer 2: AI Synthesis Engine 1 Salesperson Asks for Briefing 2 Gemini Synthesizes Data into a Briefing Document Layer 3: Actionable Output 3 Salesperson Receives Concise Briefing BigQuery flows to Vertex AI Search Vertex AI Search retrieves relevant info from 1 Salesperson Asks for Briefing 2 Gemini Synthesizes Data into a Briefing Document sends briefing to 3 Salesperson Receives Concise Briefing.
95_cSuUItQ.max-2200x2200.png: Stacked Architecture for an AI Meeting Assistant Layer 1: The Live Meeting with Live Meeting in Progress and AI Agent Joins & Records Audio Layer 2: AI Processing Pipeline (Post-Meeting) with Cloud Run Function, Speech-to-Text (Creates transcript), and Gemini (Summarizes & finds action items) Layer 3: Final Output & Delivery with Structured Summary Emailed to All Attendees 1. Sends recorded audio from AI Agent Joins & Records Audio to Cloud Run Function 2. Sends generated summary from Gemini to Structured Summary Emailed to All Attendees
96_3T4gFCm.max-1900x1900.png: Stacked Architecture for Unified Enterprise Search Layer 1: Data Ingestion & Indexing (Background) Workplace Apps (Drive, Slack, Salesforce, etc.) Vertex AI Search (Indexes all company data) Layer 2: Employee Search Experience 1 Employee Asks Question 2 Unified Answer is Returned (with links to sources) Data flows: Workplace Apps (Drive, Slack, Salesforce, etc.) to Vertex AI Search (Indexes all company data) Vertex AI Search (Indexes all company data) to 2 Unified Answer is Returned (with links to sources) labeled Returns synthesized answer 1 Employee Asks Question to Vertex AI Search (Indexes all company data) labeled Queries
97_l4gsDg2.max-2000x2000.png: Stacked Architecture for a Proactive Video AI Agent Layer 1: Real-time Data Source with Live CCTV Feeds (Streamed to Cloud Storage) Layer 2: The AI Monitoring Engine with Video Intelligence Agent (Multimodal Gemini) and Natural Language Tasks (e.g., 'Alert if queue > 10 people') Layer 3: Actionable Output with Real-time Mobile Alert (with video clip) Data flows: Layer 1 continuously monitors and streams to Layer 2, Layer 2 processes and sends alert when event is detected to Layer 3.
99.max-2200x2200.png: Stacked Architecture for Customer Feedback Analysis Layer 1: Data Pipeline Customer Feedback Sources (Reviews, Tickets, Social Media) BigQuery (Stores raw & structured data) Layer 2: AI Analysis Engine (Scheduled Job) Gemini (Categorizes, analyzes sentiment, & extracts feature requests) Layer 3: Business Intelligence & Action Dashboard (Visualizes trends) Product Manager Takes Action 2. Sends raw feedback to 3. Writes structured insights back to 4. Feeds
100.max-2200x2200.png: Stacked Architecture for AI-Powered Ad Content Generation Layer 1: User Input with User Provides Product Details & Target Audience Layer 2: AI Creative Generation with Cloud Run (Constructs prompt for Gemini), Gemini (Generates text content), Text-to-Speech API (Creates voiceover) Layer 3: Automated Ad Assembly & Output with Multiple Ad Variations Ready for Deployment User Provides Product Details & Target Audience sends info to Cloud Run Cloud Run sends to Gemini Gemini sends text content to Text-to-Speech API Text-to-Speech API combines with images & templates to generate Multiple Ad Variations Ready for Deployment.
101.max-2200x2200.png: Stacked Architecture for AI Observability Production AI Apps Send Telemetry Data Observability Platform (on GKE) Store & Analyze Data (BigQuery) AI Detects Issues (e.g., 'model drift') Alert on Dashboard Dev Team Fixes Problem Layer 1: Data Ingestion & Storage Layer 2: Automated AI Analysis Layer 3: Alerting & Resolution Production AI Apps Send Telemetry Data flows to Observability Platform (on GKE) flows to Store & Analyze Data (BigQuery) flows to AI Detects Issues (e.g., 'model drift') If issue is detected flows to Alert on Dashboard flows to Dev Team Fixes Problem
